description: issue #332 (A2): executing the bare `hint` meta-command emits exactly one `tutor-output` event with `command: "hint"`, a REQUIRED `stage` (starting at `"nudge"` for a first-ever request, spec/execution-model.md:640-652) and a REQUIRED `target_source_span` — since `hint` is the only statement (no preceding statement to point at), it falls back to the whole-program span, per `hint`'s explicit whole-program fallback (unlike `explain`/`why`/`debug`, whose target is optional).

segments: Here is a small nudge about the most recent instruction.
